_site_note: Site URL/path are environment-specific and intentionally NOT hardcoded — every QA's Local site differs. Derive at run time: test_site_path = the WP root you run wp-cli from (this plugin lives at <root>/wp-content/plugins/wp-career-board, so the root is the current dir when you run wp); test_site_url = `wp --path=<root> option get home`. Set explicit values here only to pin a fixed CI box.
fixture_cleanup_sql: DELETE FROM {prefix}posts WHERE post_type IN ('wcb_job','wcb_application','wcb_resume','wcb_company','wcb_board','wcb_credit_package') AND (post_title LIKE 'Smoke %' OR post_title LIKE 'Smoke-Batch%' OR post_title LIKE 'E2E %')
